scope: conditional global sharp subgaussian bound from block-RMS domination plus Jensen scalar envelope
conditional_theorem: If the Golay shell block-RMS domination lemma holds for weights 8,12,16,24, then M_C(u) <= exp(K2 ||u||^2 / 2) for all u in R^24 with the displayed K2.
remaining_residue: prove the Golay shell block-RMS domination lemma for all nonnegative x_i
